verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, we come into Your house And we gather in Your name, It's a privilege to be here, We're so very glad we came; We can sense Your Holy Presence And the warmth of Your embrace, As we lift our hearts in worship We bring the sacrifice of praise.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We bring the sacrifice of praise, into the house of the Lord. We bring the sacrifice of praise, into the house of the Lord. And we offer up to You the sacrifices of thanksgiving. And we offer up to You the sacrifices of joy.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, You taught us in Your Word To give thanks in everything You provide a place of refuge Beneath the shadow of Your wings So we purpose to obey You And to walk in all your ways Lord in every situation We bring the sacrifice of praise.
